name: agentcentral-mcp
description: agentcentral is a hosted Amazon MCP server, Amazon Seller Central MCP server, and Amazon Ads MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and HTTP-capable MCP clients. This package is a stdio introspection stub for the 148-tool hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint at https://mcp.agentcentral.to/mcp.
